description: A passenger without elite status wants to purchase a one-time pass to the airline's airport lounge.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the passenger is flying with the airline today.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the passenger has a valid same-day boarding pass.

nodes.task_description: Inform the passenger of the price for a day pass.
Process the passenger's payment and provide them with access to the lounge.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent takes payment and grants access.
